articles.author: Carly Cassella
articles.title: Brain Scans Reveal a Surprise About Neanderthal Intelligence - ScienceAlert
articles.description: In 1857, the German anatomist Hermann Schaaffhausen analyzed a human fossil with "an extraordinary form" that he had never seen before – not in "existing European stocks", he wrote, or "even in the most barbarous races." The curious cranium had been unearthed…
